ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_family" TEXT /* Family of the department (e.g., Ministry of Justice) */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Name of the entity (e.g., HMCTS) */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the department */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the department */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Primary contact person for the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the department record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department incurring the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expense transaction */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of the expense (e.g., Creditors, Debtors) */,
  "expense_area" TEXT /* Area where the expense is categorized (e.g., Balance Sheet) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_number" INTEGER /* Unique transaction number for the expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount spent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "supplier_postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the supplier */,
  "project_code" INTEGER /* Project code associated with the expense */,
  "expenditure_type" TEXT /* Type of expenditure (e.g., Programme, Balance Sheet) */,
  "contract_number" INTEGER /* Contract number related to the expense */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., None) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year in which the expense was incurred */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the expense */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Overdue) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the expense was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the expense record */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the expense */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_expense_type FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_expenditure_type FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_type") REFERENCES expenditure_types ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier associated with the contract */,
  "contract_number" TEXT /* Identifier for the contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., Active, Inactive, Terminated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contract was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the contract record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_types" (
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure type */,
  "expenditure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure type (e.g., Balance Sheet, Programme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type (e.g., Creditors, Debtors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_log" (
  "transaction_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log entry */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated expense */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Added, Updated, Deleted) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_log_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance manager, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers_postcodes" (
  "supplier_postcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier postcode entry */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_postcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_code" INTEGER /* Code associated with the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
